description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 15 hrs 36 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 13 mins. His activity was spread across 5 projects, and his most-used languages were Other, Java, Markdown, and TypeScript. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded in the provided data.
